title: Add pypptx verify command for post-generation validation
description: Add a generic `pypptx verify` CLI command that programmatically checks a .pptx file for five categories of common quality issues after generation: unfilled placeholder hint text, font size below minimum, shape overflow, text clipping, and significant shape overlap. The command outputs structured JSON by default with a --plain text mode, exits 0 when clean and 1 on errors, and is integrated into the QA checklist in SKILL.md as the first step before thumbnail inspection. All checks are template-agnostic with no hardcoded fonts, dimensions, locales, or brand-specific logic.
